name: Scandinavian Fish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine vinegar and water. Add sugar and Pickling Spice.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil 2 minutes; cool. Strain and discard spices.
3. Cut herring fillets into 1/2"-wide strips and place in a shallow dish. Pour cold marinade over fish. Cover and marinate several hours or overnight.
4. Drain herring strips. In a bowl, combine sour cream, mayonnaise, mustard, and onion.
5. Cut apples into fourths, remove cores, and slice thinly (do not peel). Add sliced apples to the sour cream mixture and mix gently until coated with dressing.
6. Arrange lettuce leaves on 4 plates. Spoon herring mixture onto plates and garnish with green onions and dill sprigs, if desired. Serve chilled.
